text:
うん、まあいいんじゃないかしら。
特に気負ってる感じもないし。

気楽にやれば、アンタだったら
このぐらい朝飯前だもんね。

その心の余裕を忘れちゃダメよ。
それじゃ、またね！

That was...okay, I guess.
You don't seem especially taxed, either.

You could do this kinda stuff with one
hand tied behind your back if you'd just
take it easy.

Cut yourself a little slack every now and then,
okay? Well, see you around!
